# NonFileRootDisposition enumeration

A receiver's permitted disposition of a root whose `uri` is not `file`-scheme (R-21.1.5-c).

```csharp
public enum NonFileRootDisposition
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Reject | `0` | Reject the non-`file` root (surface an error). |
| Ignore | `1` | Silently ignore the non-`file` root. |
